definition:
1. to put out : 
2. to put out  a child, i. e. give him in adoption , (Isaeus Orator) 
3. Mid. to produce, bring forth , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
4. to make complete, finish, finish off , (Herdotus Historicus):—;with genitive materiae, Παρίου λίθου τὰ ἔμπροσθε ἐξεποίησαν they made all  the front of Parian marble, (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
